channel.title: Linkedin on Imlauer
channel.description: Recent content in Linkedin on Imlauer

item.title: Linkedin George Hotz
item.description:
Perfil: https://www.linkedin.com/in/george-hotz-b3866476 Nombre: George Hotz Título: Founder at the tiny corp Empresa: the tiny corp / comma.ai Ubicación: San Diego, California, United States Seguidores: 56K Total Posts: 194

📝 Índice de Publicaciones (Extraídas ~70+ posts)

2026 (Posts Recientes)

  1. It’s only the people who don’t produce value who should fear AI job loss
  2. lol anyone else realized that the internet is over?
  3. Do you know about polynomial time factoring algorithms?
  4. Today we should ramp down rhetoric
  5. HAHAHA PEOPLE ON TWITTER TOOK MY $0.003/HR SALARY SERIOUSLY
  6. This is the way
  7. The story isn’t that LLMs are AGI, it’s that we have been massively overpaying software engineers
  8. Recently seen on X: “I should have sold when the asset had an inflated valuation.”
  9. Comma is finally shipping driving models trained on-policy in a learned simulator
  10. Who are you doing this for?
  11. I know society has told you nothing is shameful and pride is for the gays
  12. To the people just graduated thinking about going to Silicon Valley
  13. The US has closed source AI models with rules and terms and stuff
  14. Who is spending today grifting?
  15. Oh man imagine spending your life climbing a corporate ladder
  16. The jig is up. The party is over. The ship is sinking!!!
  17. “Over the past fifty years, the U.S. economy built a giant rent-extraction layer…”
  18. How actually ridiculous is it that still today comma.ai is the second best driving system
  19. Hello corporate participant. You are building the machine that will eat you.
  20. Nailed the bio
  21. is this the singularity?

2025

  1. I can’t wait until the scams stop and American labor finds its real market
  2. Have you bought your comma four yet?

2024

  1. After the trauma of my LinkedIn ban
  2. I don’t have much hope for LinkedIn, but we are hiring
  3. Did you know you can add the best ADAS system in the world to your car?
  4. OMG THIS IS BETTER THAN Q* GIVE ME THAT SWEET HYPE
  5. there’s not enough pictures of tinyboxes on linkedin
  6. #meritocracy (Junio 2024)
  7. #meritocracy

2023

  1. My fellow GOOG shareholders, I think the time has come
  2. It will still take a little before people believe this is possible
  3. #meritocracy (Diciembre 2023)
  4. Money-back trial - comma 3x
  5. lol, AT&T finally discovered e-mail and sent me that C&D
  6. Qualcomm chip sales down 25 percent, plans layoffs
  7. A reminder that we sell $1000 meetings in the comma.ai shop
  8. #qualcomm #ai #investing
  9. Bounties
  10. the tiny corp raised $5.1M
  11. #mlperf
  12. The tiny corp is looking for contracts!
  13. the tiny corp (@tinygrad) on X
  14. touching grass freestyle by tomcr00se

2022

  1. George Hotz 🌑 (@realGeorgeHotz) on X
  2. So I haven’t gotten my blue check back (Twitter)
  3. openpilot FAQ
  4. GitHub - commaai/calib_challenge
  5. If you need to put more and more resources in to see the same rate of progress
  6. yo linkedin should just ban people who copy and paste the same crap

2021

  1. Introducing comma three
  2. When I see Autonomous Vehicle companies doing IPOs
  3. Sell Outs
  4. GitHub - commaai/openpilot
  5. Come build the future
  6. Without looking it up: DNS? DHCP?

2020

  1. I’m still getting messages from people asking to meet with comma
  2. Classic YouTube thumbnail!
  3. Real people using a real product

2019

  1. AEB: a Case Study Using comma.ai Dataset
  2. LinkedIn is not a dating site
  3. George Hotz (@georgehotz) • Instagram profile

📄 Publicaciones Completas

2026

1. It’s only the people who don’t produce value who should fear AI job loss

Fecha: 3h (3 horas)
